source_of_truth: Supabase products table (pyznlglvwihosemqkhtq); full variant specs live there — this file is a distilled work queue only
rights_status: UNRESOLVED — Step 0 blocking. No downloads permitted until packages/catalog/manufacturer-domains.json is founder-ratified.
note_existing_sources: kama-serie-v / kama-serie-w / kama-serie-x already have supplier photos in assets/products-source/camiones/ and are NOT in this queue.

skus.name: KAMA Serie GM — Volquetes Diésel (Diesel Dumper Trucks)
skus.priority_reason: only SKU with a truly empty images array
skus.body_type: dump truck (volquete) — tipper body, one-and-half or single cabin
skus.visual_identifiers: 6-wheel dumper, cabin widths 1900/2030mm, tipper box 3650–4200mm, GVW 11.2–18.3t

skus.name: KAMA GM67E — Diésel Euro-V
skus.visual_identifiers: 9.00R20 tyres, 4200x2300x800 tipper box, GVW 16.62t, Yunnei YNF40E1. Same unit family as kama-serie-gm — one good GM67E source can serve both, staged twice.

skus.name: KAMA Serie K — Camión Ligero-Medio (Light-Medium Truck)
skus.body_type: light cargo truck, flatbed/stake box, single or one-and-half cabin

skus.name: KAMA Serie M1 — Camión Ligero (Light Truck)
KAMA Serie M3 — Camión Medio (Medium Truck)
KAMA M36F — Diésel Euro-VI
skus.visual_identifiers: 4160x2100 cargo box, GVW 5.58t, Isuzu JE493ZLQ6A. Same unit family as kama-serie-m3 — one good M36F source can serve both, staged twice.

skus.name: KAMA Serie M6 — Carga Media/Pesada (Medium/Heavy Cargo)
KAMA Serie S — Mini Van
skus.body_type: mini van / minibus (cargo van S6–S8, passenger SP6–SP8)

skus.name: KAMA ES/ESP — Furgón Eléctrico (Electric Van)
skus.body_type: electric van (cargo ES6–ES8, passenger ESP6–ESP8) — visually similar body to Serie S
skus.visual_identifiers: BEV, unitized body, no exhaust, charge port; distinguish from Serie S by EV badging/grille

skus.name: KAMA EW/EV — Eléctrico Mini (Electric Mini Truck)
skus.body_type: electric mini flatbed truck, single cabin
skus.visual_identifiers: small BEV flatbed 4.1–5.6m, GVW 2.1–3.4t; EW1/EW2 records say RHD — verify facing/steering side in any source

skus.name: KAMA EX/EM — Eléctrico Pesado (Heavy Electric Truck)
